clinic_driver_logic.sql_text:
SELECT 
    period_name, 
    '수익비(행위)' as driver_name, 
    abc_order_dept, abc_oper_dept, abc_order_dct, abc_oper_dct, 
    SUM(금액) as total_value 
FROM clinic_revenue 
WHERE suga_category = '행위' 
  AND period_name = '2026년03월' 
GROUP BY 
    period_name, 
    '수익비(행위)', 
    abc_order_dept, abc_oper_dept, abc_order_dct, abc_oper_dct

SELECT 
    PERIOD_NAME, 
    '부서별인원수', 
    dept_code, 
    SUM(VALUE) 
FROM clinic_payment 
WHERE 1 = '1' 
  AND PERIOD_NAME = '2026년03월' 
GROUP BY 
    PERIOD_NAME, 
    '부서별인원수', 
    dept_code

SELECT 
    period_name, 
    '수익비(재료)' as driver_name, 
    abc_order_dept, abc_oper_dept, abc_order_dct, abc_oper_dct, 
    SUM(금액) as total_value 
FROM clinic_revenue 
WHERE suga_category = '재료' 
  AND period_name = '2026년03월' 
GROUP BY 
    period_name, 
    '수익비(재료)', 
    abc_order_dept, abc_oper_dept, abc_order_dct, abc_oper_dct

SELECT 
    period_name, 
    '수익비(전체)' as driver_name, 
    abc_order_dept, abc_oper_dept, abc_order_dct, abc_oper_dct, 
    SUM(금액) as total_value 
FROM clinic_revenue 
WHERE 1 = '1' 
  AND period_name = '2026년03월' 
GROUP BY 
    period_name, 
    '수익비(전체)', 
    abc_order_dept, abc_oper_dept, abc_order_dct, abc_oper_dct

SELECT 
    PERIOD_NAME, 
    '검사환자수', 
    abc_order_dept, abc_oper_dept, abc_order_dct, abc_oper_dct, 
    SUM(VALUE) 
FROM clinic_patient_stats 
WHERE driver_code = '검사환자수' 
  AND PERIOD_NAME = '2026년03월' 
GROUP BY 
    PERIOD_NAME, 
    '검사환자수', 
    abc_order_dept, abc_oper_dept, abc_order_dct, abc_oper_dct

SELECT 
    PERIOD_NAME, 
    '외래환자수', 
    abc_order_dept, abc_oper_dept, abc_order_dct, abc_oper_dct, 
    SUM(VALUE) 
FROM clinic_patient_stats 
WHERE driver_code = '외래환자수' 
  AND PERIOD_NAME = '2026년03월' 
GROUP BY 
    PERIOD_NAME, 
    '외래환자수', 
    abc_order_dept, abc_oper_dept, abc_order_dct, abc_oper_dct

clinic_costing_process.message: 지원활동 원가를 타 활동으로 상호배부 행렬 적용합니다.
지원활동 원가를 타 활동으로 상호배부 행렬 적용합니다.
최종 원가대상별 원가 귀속 결과를 분석하여 검증용 보고서 데이터를 생성합니다.
